codeList:
C:\>Invoke-WebRequest https://raw.githubusercontent.com/milvus-io/milvus/refs/heads/master/scripts/standalone_embed.bat -OutFile standalone.batвЂ‹

C:\>standalone.bat startвЂ‹
Wait for Milvus starting...вЂ‹
Start successfully.вЂ‹
To change the default Milvus configuration, edit user.yaml and restart the service.вЂ‹

# Stop MilvusвЂ‹
C:\>standalone.bat stopвЂ‹
Stop successfully.вЂ‹
вЂ‹
# Delete Milvus containerвЂ‹
C:\>standalone.bat deleteвЂ‹
Delete Milvus container successfully. # Container has been removed.вЂ‹
Delete successfully. # Data has been removed.вЂ‹

C:\>wsl --installвЂ‹
Ubuntu already installed.вЂ‹
Starting Ubuntu...вЂ‹

# Download the installation scriptвЂ‹
$ curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/milvus-io/milvus/master/scripts/standalone_embed.sh -o standalone_embed.shвЂ‹
вЂ‹
# Start the Docker containerвЂ‹
$ bash standalone_embed.sh startвЂ‹

$ bash standalone_embed.sh startвЂ‹
Wait for Milvus Starting...вЂ‹
Start successfully.вЂ‹
To change the default Milvus configuration, add your settings to the user.yaml file and then restart the service.вЂ‹

# Stop MilvusвЂ‹
$ bash standalone_embed.sh stopвЂ‹
Stop successfully.вЂ‹
вЂ‹
# Delete Milvus dataвЂ‹
$ bash standalone_embed.sh stopвЂ‹
Delete Milvus container successfully.вЂ‹
Delete successfully.вЂ‹

# Download the configuration file and rename it as docker-compose.ymlвЂ‹
C:\>Invoke-WebRequest https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/releases/download/v2.6.20/milvus-standalone-docker-compose.yml -OutFile docker-compose.ymlвЂ‹
вЂ‹
# Start MilvusвЂ‹
C:\>docker compose up -dвЂ‹
Creating milvus-etcd  ... doneвЂ‹
Creating milvus-minio ... doneвЂ‹
Creating milvus-standalone ... doneвЂ‹

C:\>wsl --installвЂ‹
Ubuntu already installed.вЂ‹
Starting Ubuntu...вЂ‹

$ wget https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/releases/download/v2.6.20/milvus-standalone-docker-compose.yml -O docker-compose.ymlвЂ‹

$ sudo docker compose up -dвЂ‹
вЂ‹
Creating milvus-etcd  ... doneвЂ‹
Creating milvus-minio ... doneвЂ‹
Creating milvus-standalone ... doneвЂ‹

C:\>net start com.docker.serviceвЂ‹
The Docker for Windows Service service is starting.вЂ‹
The Docker for Windows Service service was started successfully.вЂ‹

C:\>wsl --updateвЂ‹
Checking for updates.вЂ‹
The most recent version of Windows Subsystem for Linux is already installed.вЂ‹

C:\>cd "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker"вЂ‹
C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker>.\DockerCli.exe -SwitchDaemonвЂ‹
Switching to windows engine: Post "http://ipc/engine/switch": open \\.\pipe\dockerBackendApiServer: The system cannot find the file specified.вЂ‹
